{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''[Koedi Raef]'' managed to have the ''Fireclaw'' delayed and Imperial garrison troops on Vilosoria, lacking reinforcements, were driven from the planet by the natives, who, with the coming of the warm seasons, had metamorphosized into powerful carnivores.|Airen Cracken|<ref name="CRO" />}}
The '''Vilosorians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vilosoria]]. Their bodies followed a seasonal cycle, metamorphosizing into powerful [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]] with the onset of the warm seasons. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Vilosorians were able to [[Liberation of Vilosoria|repel]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence from their world with the intervention of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents who delayed Imperial reinforcements. Their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was later within the territory of Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]]'s [[Greater Maldrood]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Vilosorians were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vilosoria]]. Their physique matched the seasonal cycles of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]];<ref name="CRO" /> consequently, during the cold months of their year, they were docile and calm,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|306|Vilosoria}}</ref> but with the onset of the warm seasons, the Vilosorians metamorphosized into powerful [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]].<ref name="CRO" />

==History==
===Early history===
The Vilosorians evolved on the planet Vilosoria, located within the [[Lifh sector/Legends|Lifh sector]],<ref name="CRO" /> a portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] within [[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]. Their planet was situated between the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] and the [[Lesser Lantillian Route]], within the general region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] being explored by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Great Manifest Period/Legends|Great Manifest Period]], circa [[20,000 BBY/Legends|20,000]]–[[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]].> During the [[Jedi Civil War]], circa [[3959 BBY]], their planet fell within the territory controlled by [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan's]] [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]]; however, they were within Republic space during the [[New Sith Wars]] of [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Vilosoria fell within territory contested between the Republic and the separatist [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

===Galactic Empire and beyond===
[[File:R2Z-DL-CRO.png|thumb|right|200px|R2z-DL, responsible for the liberation of Vilosoria]]
{{Quote|Toozy is credited with actions that led to the ultimate liberation of Vilosoria.|Airen Cracken|<ref name="CRO" />}}
Following the Clone Wars, the Republic transitioned into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> The Empire briefly invaded Vilosoria,<ref name="CSWE" /> establishing a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] of [[Troop/Legends|troops]] on the planet, with support provided by the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Fireclaw]]''. Prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[R2z-DL]], an [[R2z Starship Maintenance Droid]] working as an agent of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], intercepted information on the Imperial supply lines in Lifh [[Sector/Legends|sector]], along with the ''Fireclaw''{{'s}} patrol routes and maintenance record. R2z-DL passed this information on to Rebel agent [[Koedi Raef]], together with information on the seasonal cycles of the Vilosorians. With that information, Raef coordinated a delay in the ''Fireclaw''{{'s}} arrival to the [[Vilosoria system/Legends|Vilosoria system]] with that of the planet's warm season. That provided an opportunity for the Vilosorians—then metamorphosized into their carnivorous form—to [[Liberation of Vilosoria|attack]] the local Imperial garrison and drive them offworld.<ref name="CRO" />

Despite the Vilosorians' local success, Vilosoria remained within a zone of Imperial control from [[4 ABY/Legends|4]]–[[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]; known as the [[Greater Maldrood]], the area was controlled by Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]], until he was defeated by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] circa [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Vilosorians were created by [[Chuck Truett]] for ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. They later received a mention in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], which provided some new information not in the original source. In [[2009]], ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed their homeworld and consequently provided further information on the general history of the species and planet.
